# B2B Industrial Solutions

Website: https://b2bindustrial.in/

B2B Industrial Solutions is an India-based industrial audit, compliance and engineering services company. The company supports manufacturing plants, commercial facilities, hospitals, hotels, IT parks, real estate assets and industrial operators with audits, statutory compliance support and project execution.

## Core Services

- Energy audits and comprehensive energy audits
- Electrical safety audits, power quality analysis and thermography
- Fire safety, HSE, HIRA, risk management and fire load studies
- Statutory compliance, NOC coordination and environmental approvals
- HVAC projects, indoor air quality work and robotic duct cleaning
- RECD, DFK, DG emission compliance and emission-control systems
- Lighting, electrical, fire protection and turnkey project management
- Carbon footprint studies, ESG audits and renewable energy support

## Important URLs

- Home: https://b2bindustrial.in/
- All services: https://b2bindustrial.in/service
- Contact: https://b2bindustrial.in/contact
- About: https://b2bindustrial.in/about
- Insights: https://b2bindustrial.in/blog/
- Sitemap: https://b2bindustrial.in/sitemap.xml

## Contact

- Phone: +91 98997 02065
- Email: info@b2bindustrial.in
- Address: Shop No. 2, Gali No. 4, Khandsa Road, Gurugram, Haryana 122001, India

For quotes, audits, compliance support and site visits, use the contact page: https://b2bindustrial.in/contact

---

# B2B Industrial Solutions

> B2B Industrial Solutions provides industrial audits, statutory compliance, fire and HSE safety, energy, electrical, HVAC, emission-control and turnkey engineering services across India.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://b2bindustrial.in/)
- [Services](https://b2bindustrial.in/service)
- [Industries served](https://b2bindustrial.in/industries/)
- [About](https://b2bindustrial.in/about)
- [Industrial insights](https://b2bindustrial.in/blog/)
- [Service locations](https://b2bindustrial.in/locations/)
- [Engineering tools](https://b2bindustrial.in/tools/)
- [Contact](https://b2bindustrial.in/contact)

## Industries
- [Energy, Fire & Electrical Audits for Commercial Buildings](https://b2bindustrial.in/industries/commercial-buildings): Integrated energy, HVAC, indoor-air-quality, electrical and fire-safety audits for offices, malls, hotels and commercial campuses across India.
- [Energy & Electrical Safety Audits for Data Centres in India](https://b2bindustrial.in/industries/data-centres): Data-centre energy, power-quality, electrical safety, cooling and fire-risk audits designed around uptime, redundancy and controlled implementation.
- [Industrial Audit Services for Manufacturing Plants in India](https://b2bindustrial.in/industries/manufacturing): Energy, electrical safety, fire, HSE and environmental audits for manufacturing plants, with practical engineering support from assessment to implementation.

## Services
- [Air Balancing & IAQ Services | HVAC Performance Optimization](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/air-balancing): Professional Air Balancing and Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) testing services by B2B Industrial. Optimize HVAC performance, ensure regulatory compliance, reduce energy costs, and improve occupant health with our precision audits.
- [Arc Flash Study & Risk Assessment | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/arc-flash-study): Advanced Arc Flash Risk Assessment (IEEE 1584 &amp;amp; NFPA 70E). Incident energy calculations, boundary determinations, and PPE category labeling for industrial facilities.
- [Sustainability Audits & ESG Advisory | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/audits-sustainability): Comprehensive Sustainability Audits and ESG strategic advisory. Align your operations with BRSR, GRI, and UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
- [Behavioral Based Safety (BBS) Training | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/behavioural-safety-training): Behavioral Based Safety (BBS) training programs to transform workplace safety culture. Reduce accidents by addressing unsafe acts and reinforcing safe behavior.
- [Behavioural Safety Training | BBS Audits India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/behavioural-safety): Implement a proactive Behavioural Based Safety (BBS) program by B2B Industrial. Reduce workplace accidents by up to 80% through behavioral observation, immediate feedback, and safety culture coaching.
- [Boiler Efficiency Testing & Optimization | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/boiler-efficiency): Maximize your industrial boiler performance with B2B Industrial
- [Cable Laying & Termination | Industrial Electrical Services](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/cable-laying): Professional HT/LT cable laying, jointing, and termination services. Certified experts ensuring safe and efficient power distribution for industrial facilities.
- [Industrial Cable Tray Management Systems | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/cable-tray): Expert installation of cable management systems including Ladder, Perforated, and Wire Mesh trays. Ensure organized, safe, and accessible plant cabling.
- [Carbon Footprint Study | Net Zero Path | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/carbon-footprint): Strategic Carbon Footprint assessment for industries. GHG Protocol Scope 1, 2, and 3 mapping. Drive your Decarbonization and Sustainability journey.
- [Chartered Engineer Certifications | B2B](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/chartered-engineering): Authorized Chartered Engineer services including Machinery Valuation, Factory Act Stability Certificates, EPCG import certification, and Pressure Vessel testing.
- [Statutory Compliances & Approvals | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/compliances): Expert liaison for industrial approvals: Pollution Control (CTE/CTO), Electrical NOC, Fire NOC, Factory Act licensing, and more.
- [Comprehensive Energy Audit | Data-Driven Efficiency](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/comprehensive-energy-audit): In-depth Industrial Energy Audits focusing on thermal, electrical, and water efficiency. Comprehensive reporting with verified ROI and implementation support.
- [Compressed Air Leakage Testing | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/compressed-air-testing): Stop wasting energy. Our Ultrasonic Leak Detection services identify costly compressed air leaks to reduce compressor load and electricity bills.
- [CPCB IV+ Compliant Diesel Generators | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/cpcb-dgs): Supply and installation of latest CPCB IV+ certified Diesel Generators (10 kVA to 2500 kVA). compliant, fuel-efficient, and eco-friendly power solutions.
- [Industrial Cyber Security & OT Audits | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/cyber-audits): Secure your Industrial Control Systems (ICS), SCADA, and OT infrastructure with our comprehensive Cyber Security Audits and VAPT services.
- [Disaster Management Plans (DMP) | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/disaster-management): Comprehensive Disaster Management Plans (DMP) and Emergency Response Strategies to ensure business continuity and personnel safety during crises.
- [Mock Drills & Emergency Simulations | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/drills-simulation): Conducting realistic fire drills, evacuation simulations, and tabletop exercises to test emergency readiness and improve response times.
- [Robotic Duct Cleaning Services | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/duct-cleaning): Advanced robotic air duct cleaning for HVAC systems. Improve indoor air quality and system efficiency with our verifiable, technology-driven cleaning process.
- [E-HAZOP Study | Electrical Safety Risk Assessment India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/e-hazop): Expert E-HAZOP studies to systematically identify electrical hazards and operability issues in complex industrial power systems.
- [E-Waste Recycling & Disposal Services | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/e-waste-solutions): Authorized E-Waste recycling and data destruction services. Secure, sustainable disposal of IT assets and industrial electronics.
- [Earthing & Grounding Audit | IS 3043 | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/earthing-audit): Ensure total life safety and CNC protection. Expert Megger testing and Earthing Audits based on IS 3043 for industrial plants across Pan-India.
- [Earthing & Lightning Protection Systems | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/earthing-projects): Maintenance-free Chemical Earthing and ESE Lightning Protection Systems. Earth pit design, soil resistivity testing, and turnkey grounding solutions.
- [Electrical Compliance & Statutory Liaison | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-compliance): Turnkey consultancy for obtaining Electrical Inspector approvals, Sanction Load changes, and statutory compliance with Central Electricity Authority (CEA) norms.
- [HT & LT Electrical Projects | B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-projects): Turnkey HT and LT electrical project execution. Substation installation, LT panel design, cabling, and industrial electrification by certified engineers.
- [Electrical Safety Audit Company in India | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-safety-audit): Ensure total workplace safety with comprehensive Electrical Safety Audits (ESA). We detect fire hazards, analyze earthing, and assess your power grid Pan India.
- [Electrical Safety Audit (CEA 2023) | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-safety): Comprehensive Electrical Safety Audits compliant with CEA Regulation 2023. Identify fire risks, ensure regulatory compliance, and protect your facility.
- [Industrial Electrical Goods Supply | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-sales): Authorized suppliers of premium industrial electrical goods. Switchgear, Cables, Panels, Lighting, and Automation components at best market rates.
- [Infrared Thermography Service | Electrical Hotspot Detection](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/electrical-thermography): Certified Infrared Thermography services for electrical panels, transformers, and motors. Detect hotspots, prevent fire hazards, and reduce downtime.
- [Emergency Response Plan | EPRP Compliance Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/emergency-preparedness): Develop comprehensive Emergency Preparedness &amp;amp; Response Plans (EPRP). On-site, off-site planning, mock drill training, and hazmat response strategies.
- [Air Pollution & Emission Control Systems | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/emission-control): Advanced Air Pollution Control (APC) systems. Wet Scrubbers, Bag Filters, Cyclones, and Dust Collectors to meet CPCB emission norms.
- [Energy Audit Services India | BEE Certified Experts](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/energy-audits): BEE Accredited Energy Audits for industries and commercial buildings. Identify energy saving opportunities, optimize power consumption, and reduce utility bills.
- [Energy Saving Implementation Projects | ESCO Services](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/energy-saving-projects): Turnkey implementation of energy conservation projects. We implement VS2, Heat Recovery, Lighting, and Automation solutions with guaranteed payback.
- [Environment Compliances - B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/environment-compliances): Expert assistance with Environment Compliances, including Consent to Establish (CTE) and Consent to Operate (CTO) from Pollution Control Boards.
- [Workplace Ergonomics Assessment | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/ergonomics): Improve employee health and productivity with our professional Ergonomics Workplace Assessment. Reduce MSI risks and enhance workplace wellbeing.
- [EV Charging Station Solutions | Industrial & Commercial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/ev-charging): Turnkey EV Charging Station solutions for industries, corporate parks, and residential complexes. Consultancy, Supply, and Installation of fast chargers.
- [Post-Audit Execution & PM Recommendations | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/execution-recommendations): Bridge the gap between audit findings and actual implementation. Specialized execution support for Safety, Electrical, and Energy recommendations.
- [Featured Industrial Products | B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/featured-products): Curated selection of best-selling industrial products. High-quality electrical components, safety gear, and energy-saving tools from top OEMs.
- [Fire Safety Compliance & Audit Services | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-compliance): Comprehensive Fire Safety Audits, Fire NOC assistance, and Fire Load Calculations. Ensure your facility meets national fire safety standards.
- [Fire Detection & Alarm Systems | B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-detection): Advanced Fire Detection and Alarm Systems. Smoke detectors, heat detectors, and VESDA solutions for early fire warning.
- [Fire Rated Doors & Passive Fire Protection | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-doors): High-performance Fire-rated Steel and Wooden Doors with 60 to 120-minute fire ratings. UL &amp;amp; CBRI certified passive fire protection solutions.
- [Fire Extinguishers Supply & Refilling | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-extinguishers): Sourcing and refilling of ISI marked Fire Extinguishers. ABC, CO2, Mechanical Foam, and Clean Agent solutions for all fire classes.
- [Life Safety Code Audits | Fire Safety | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-life-safety): Comprehensive Life Safety Code Audits based on NBC and NFPA standards. Evaluation of means of egress, emergency lighting, and fire compartmentalization.
- [Fire Load Calculation & Hazard Assessment | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-load-study): Scientific Fire Load Calculations for industrial and commercial buildings. Accurate thermal potential assessment to design optimal fire suppression systems.
- [Fire NOC Consultancy & Renewal | B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-noc): Expert consultancy for obtaining and renewing Fire NOC from local fire authorities. We handle documentation, system testing, and government liaison.
- [Industrial Fire Fighting Projects | B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fire-projects): Turnkey design, supply, and installation of Hydrant Systems, Sprinklers, and Fire Pump Rooms. Industrial fire protection projects delivered on time.
- [First Aid & Medical Facilities Audit | B2B INDUSTRIALS](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/first-aid-facilities): Professional First Aid and Occupational Health Center (OHC) audits. Ensure Factory Act compliance for first aid boxes, ambulance rooms, and medical facilities.
- [FM200 | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/fm200): Professional implementation of FM 200 and Kitchen Fire Suppression systems. Rapid, clean fire extinguishment without damaging your sensitive equipment.
- [Gas & Diesel Generator Sets | Silent DG Installation](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/gas-dg): Gas and diesel generator installation, commissioning, and AMC services. Silent DG sets, industrial gensets, power backup solutions from 5 kVA to 2000 kVA.
- [Harmonic Analysis Services India | Active Harmonic Filters](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/harmonic-analysis): Specialized Harmonic Analysis to identify THD-V and THD-I, mitigate resonance, and implement Active Harmonic Filters.
- [HIRA Risk Assessment | Hazard Identification Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/hira): Professional HIRA services for systematic hazard identification and risk assessment. Implement effective control measures using hierarchy of controls and risk matrices.
- [HVAC Design Services | VRF, Chillers & Systems India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/hvac-design): End-to-end HVAC solutions from design to installation. VRF/VRV systems, chillers, package units, cassettes, and ductable ACs for industrial and commercial applications.
- [HVAC Installation & Commissioning | Industrial HVAC India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/hvac-installation): Professional HVAC installation and commissioning services. Expert teams for VRF/VRV systems, chillers, AHUs, package units, and complete HVAC project execution.
- [HVAC Projects India | VRF, Chillers & Turnkey Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/hvac-projects): Complete HVAC project execution from design to commissioning. VRF/VRV systems, chillers, package units, ventilation, and robotic duct cleaning services.
- [Incident Reporting System | Root Cause Analysis India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/incident-reporting): Establish robust incident and near-miss reporting systems with root cause analysis, CAPA tracking, and trend analysis to prevent industrial accidents.
- [Industrial Lighting Solutions | LED & High Bay Lights India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/industrial-lighting): Heavy-duty industrial lighting solutions. High Bay LED lights, explosion-proof fixtures, canopy lights for warehouses, factories, and hazardous areas.
- [Office Interior Design | Corporate Fit-Out Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/interior-design): Transform your workspace with expert Interior Design Projects. Turnkey office fit-outs, space planning, furniture integration, and smart lighting for industrial and corporate spaces.
- [Lift NOC & Elevator Approval | Compliance Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/lift-noc): Secure Lift NOC and statutory approvals for elevators. Expert handling of Chief Inspector requirements, Fire NOC, load testing, and regulatory compliance documentation.
- [Lighting Projects - B2B Industrial Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/lighting-projects): Turnkey LED lighting projects for commercial, industrial, and outdoor applications. We provide custom, energy-efficient solutions from concept to commissioning.
- [Lightning Protection System | Design & Testing India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/lightning-protection): Lightning Protection System design, audit, and testing per IEC 62305. Protect your facility from direct strikes and surges with certified LPS solutions.
- [Factory License & MCD NOC | Approval Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/mcd-noc): Expert liaison for Factory License, Trade License, and Municipal Corporation approvals. Fast-track MCD NOC, building plan sanctions, and regulatory compliance.
- [NABL Testing & Noise Monitoring | Compliance Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/nabl-testing): NABL-accredited testing for soil, water, air quality, and industrial noise monitoring. Ensure environmental compliance with certified lab reports.
- [Occupational Health Risk Assessment | Workplace Safety India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/occupational-health): Comprehensive OHRA services: Chemical exposure, noise, vibration, ergonomic assessments. Ensure workplace safety and Factories Act compliance.
- [OCEMS Installation | Emission Monitoring Systems India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/ocems): OCEMS installation, calibration, and compliance services for CPCB and SPCB. Real-time stack emission monitoring for environmental regulations.
- [Office Lighting Solutions | LED Workspace Illumination](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/office-lighting): Professional office lighting solutions: LED panels, downlighters, spotlights, and task lighting. Energy-efficient illumination for productive workspaces.
- [Outdoor Lighting Solutions | LED Street & Area Lights India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/outdoor-lighting): Professional outdoor lighting: LED street lights, flood lights, bollards, and perimeter lighting. Energy-efficient solutions for campuses, roads, and parking areas.
- [Electrical Panel Projects | Custom Distribution Panels India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/panel-projects): Custom design, fabrication, and installation of electrical distribution panels. LT/HT panels, MCC, PCC, VFD panels for industrial applications.
- [Permit to Work System | PTW Audit & Compliance India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/permit-to-work): Professional PTW system implementation for safe execution of high-risk operations: hot work, confined spaces, height work, and LOTO procedures.
- [Poles & Designer Lights | Decorative Lighting Solutions](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/poles-designer-lights): Custom poles and designer lighting: Octagonal poles, tubular poles, high mast lighting, decorative fixtures for campuses, parks, and commercial spaces.
- [POSH Training & Compliance | Workplace Safety India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/posh-training): Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Act training and compliance. Internal Committee setup, awareness workshops, and policy implementation for workplaces.
- [Power Quality Analysis | Harmonics Testing India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/power-quality-analysis): Comprehensive Power Quality Analysis: THD measurement, harmonic distortion, voltage sags, transients, and phase imbalance testing for industrial equipment protection.
- [Power Quality & Harmonic Analysis Audit India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/power-quality-audit): B2B Industrial Solutions offers PQA and Power Quality Audits to eliminate voltage and current fluctuations. Ensure your delicate electrical systems are safe.
- [Process Safety Management | PSM & HAZOP Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/process-safety): Expert Process Safety Management (PSM) audits, HAZOP studies, LOPA, and mechanical integrity assessments to prevent catastrophic industrial incidents.
- [Industrial Project Management | Turnkey Solutions India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/project-management): Expert end-to-end project management for HVAC, Electrical, Fire Safety, and Emission Control projects. From concept to commissioning.
- [Public Address System | PA Installation Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/public-address): Professional Public Address (PA) systems for emergency communication, evacuation, and general announcements in industrial and commercial facilities.
- [RECD & DFK Kits | Emission Control for DG Sets](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/recd-kit): ARAI/ICAT approved RECD (Retrofitted Emission Control Devices) and Dual Fuel Kits for Diesel Generators. Reduce PM by 70%+ and meet CPCB norms.
- [Renewable Energy Solutions | Solar & Wind Projects India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/renewable-energy): Sustainable renewable energy solutions: Solar PV systems, solar water heaters, energy storage, wind energy, and hybrid systems for industrial and commercial applications.
- [Industrial Maintenance Services | Facility Management India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/repair-maintenance): Comprehensive industrial repair and maintenance: plumbing, safety training, water management, tank cleaning, and general facility repairs to minimize downtime.
- [Risk Management Services | Insurance & BCP Solutions India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/risk-management): Comprehensive risk management: operational risk assessment, insurance audit, business continuity planning, liability assessment, and crisis management for industries.
- [Smart Lighting Solutions | IoT LED Systems | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/smart-lighting): AI-powered smart lighting systems with IoT control, occupancy sensors, daylight harvesting, and energy optimization for commercial and industrial facilities.
- [Solar Lighting Systems | Off-Grid LED Solutions India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/solar-lighting): Standalone solar LED lighting for streets, parking lots, remote areas, and pathways. Zero electricity bills with battery backup for all-night illumination.
- [Solar Projects | Turnkey Solar PV Systems | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/solar-projects): Turnkey solar EPC services: rooftop and ground-mounted solar PV design, installation, commissioning, and net metering for commercial and industrial applications.
- [Stack & Duct Cleaning | Industrial Chimney Cleaning](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/stack-cleaning): Professional industrial stack, chimney, and duct cleaning services. Improve air quality, system efficiency, and fire safety compliance with thorough cleaning.
- [Stack Emission Testing | CPCB Compliance](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/stack-emission): NABL-accredited stack emission testing services for PM, SO2, NOx, CO, and VOCs. Ensure CPCB and SPCB compliance with certified emission monitoring.
- [Steam System Analysis | Energy Optimization | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/steam-analysis): Comprehensive steam system audits: steam trap testing, insulation assessment, condensate recovery, and leak detection. Reduce fuel costs by 15-30%.
- [Tool Box Talks (TBT) | Daily Safety Briefings](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/tbt): Structured Tool Box Talk (TBT) programs for daily safety awareness. Multi-lingual content library, facilitator training, and documentation support.
- [Thermography Testing, Audit Services India | B2B Industrial](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/thermography): Infrared thermography scanning for electrical panels to prevent catastrophic faults. Available Pan-India.
- [Transformer Oil Filtration | Dehydration Services India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/transformer-dehydration): Professional transformer oil filtration and dehydration services. Improve dielectric strength, extend transformer life, and prevent breakdowns with vacuum processing.
- [Industrial Ventilation Systems | Design, Installation India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/ventilation-projects): Turnkey industrial ventilation solutions: exhaust systems, LEV, fresh air systems, smoke extraction, and HVLS fans. CFD analysis, installation, and T&amp;B services.
- [Wall Mount, Step Lights | Architectural Lighting](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/wall-mount-lighting): Premium wall mount lights, step lights, and post-top luminaires for architectural accent lighting. LED technology with IP65 protection for indoor and outdoor applications.
- [Industrial Waste Management | Compliance & Recycling India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/waste-management): Sustainable waste management solutions: segregation, recycling, e-waste, hazardous waste compliance, and zero waste to landfill strategies for industrial facilities.
- [Water Audit Services India | Conservation, Compliance](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/water-audit): Comprehensive Water Audits for industrial plants. Water balance studies, CGWA compliance, waste water minimization, and rain water harvesting solutions.
- [Workplace Well-being Audit | Employee Safety India](https://b2bindustrial.in/services/well-being-audit): Comprehensive workplace well-being audits covering physical environment, mental health, ergonomics, stress management, and employee wellness programs for a healthier workforce.
